channel.title: Pilgrim on the Path
channel.description: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.
channel.itunes:author: walk · talk · meditate
channel.itunes:summary: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.

item.title: Episode 1: Austin, Texas
item.description: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky, thirty degrees, four kilometers along a lake. They had a story to tell. About an idea that started as three words at a brainstorming event, became an app, and then became this. No one asked them to build it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
item.itunes:summary: A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky, thirty degrees, four kilometers along a lake. They had a story to tell. About an idea that started as three words at a brainstorming event, became an app, and then became this. No one asked them to build it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
